name: Getting Started with Managed Snowflake MCP Server
snippet:
The Snowflake MCP Server includes Cortex Analyst and Cortex Search as tools on the standards-based interface. It is now available with Model Context Protocol ( ...
The Snowflake MCP Server includes Cortex Analyst and Cortex Search as tools on the standards-based interface. It is now available with Model Context Protocol (MCP) so that AI Agents can discover and invoke tools (Cortex Analyst, Cortex Search) via a unified and standard based interface.
